original_image_tags: A pinkish-red government postal return receipt card. The card has handwritten entries in dark ink.

elements.description: A rectangular orange-colored form (Form 3811, Rev. 1-4-40) titled 'RETURN RECEIPT'. It contains printed text, two lines for signatures (one filled with 'Raymond A Palmer', one filled with an illegible signature), a 'Date of delivery' line filled with '2-31' and '194', and a vertical handwritten string of numbers on the right edge. A 'U. S. GOVERNMENT PRINTING OFFICE' mark is at the bottom.

judge.reason: Description A describes a pinkish-red receipt card, while Description B describes an orange form with specific text, signatures, and a date that A does not mention, indicating a fundamental disagreement on the visual content.
